clips.title: The Doorway
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, composed grade. A dim interior looking toward a bright doorway, a person framed in the lit rectangle beyond, silhouetted edges. Day, contrast. A person in a coat stands in the doorway, then steps forward. The camera is completely static and locked off on a tripod, a fixed composed frame, no movement, while the subject moves within it. Bright doorway against dark interior, 35mm, static locked-off shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Window
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, quiet grade. A cozy room with a large window, soft daylight, a plant on the sill. Morning, gentle. A person in a sweater stands at the window with a mug, gazing out, then sips. The camera is completely static and locked off on a tripod, a fixed composed frame, no movement, while the subject shifts within it. Soft window light, warm interior, 40mm, static locked-off shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

The camera is completely static and locked off on a tripod, a fixed symmetrical frame, no movement, while the subject moves within it. Warm diner light, cool neon, 35mm, static locked-off shot. clips.title: The Platform

The camera is completely static and locked off on a tripod, a fixed symmetrical frame, no movement, while the subject stands within it. Even soft light, clean symmetry, 35mm, static locked-off shot. clips.title: Midnight Kitchen
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A quiet home kitchen at night, a single warm pendant light over the counter, dark edges. Night, calm. A person in loungewear stands at the counter making tea, moving unhurriedly. The camera is completely static and locked off on a tripod, a fixed composed frame, no movement, while the subject moves within it. Warm pendant light, soft dark, 40mm, static locked-off shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
